_doc: Per-domain drift threshold overrides. Keys missing from a domain block fall back to DRIFT_DEFAULTS in director.py. Reserved keys starting with '_' are comments.

security._doc: Security tasks tolerate verbose, detail-heavy output (defense-in-depth, threat modeling). Lower decomposer score floor + higher recall floor (false negatives are catastrophic).

refactor._doc: Refactors must be surgical and disciplined: tighten thresholds. Higher score + higher literal preservation; punish completion drop fast (every dropped task = scope creep).

design._doc: Design/UI tasks expect exploration and divergence. Permissive on completion drop and log inflation; persona fidelity slightly relaxed (creativity > literalism).
